---
title: "Major Robert Lawrence Scarlett"
---

## Major Robert Lawrence Scarlett

**Dates:** (b.Yorks. 1848/9)

### Description

purchaser of Otterbourne House

### Biography

He bought Otterbourne House not in 1885 as Coleridge asserts but in 1891, the date CMY gives in <i>John Keble’s Parishes</i>, which explains why JBY still resident at the time of the 1891 census.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
